name: Daily Research Digest
summary: Compiles a daily digest of research papers and articles from configured feeds and topics.
description: This agent template helps you stay current with research by aggregating content from RSS feeds, arXiv categories, or topic keywords. It produces a structured markdown digest with summaries and links. Run daily via cron to get a consistent morning briefing.

inputs.description: Optional date range and topic filters

outputs.description: Markdown digest with sections per topic

safety.description: Only fetches from configured URLs; no arbitrary requests.
Does not store personal data; outputs are local files.

compatibility.notes: Runs as read-only agent; schedule via cron on Zo.

steps: Set FEED_URLS and optional env in .env
Run zoar install daily-research-digest or copy from templates/

execution.notes: Your runtime must implement the prompt; this template only provides manifest and prompt.md.
